bannerbound.jei.info.registration_tablet: Use a Registration Tablet to invite a new citizen through settlement votes.
bannerbound.jei.info.registration_paper: Registration Paper is a lighter invitation used by the settlement registration flow.
bannerbound.jei.info.foremans_rod: The Foreman's Rod marks worker areas such as mines, fields, pens, and other managed work sites.
bannerbound.jei.info.housing_orders: Housing Orders mark enclosed house regions around a bed — the first box with a bed creates the home. Shift-right-click inside a home to manage its residents.
bannerbound.jei.info.workshop_rod: Workshop Orders mark enclosed workshop regions around work blocks like Crafting Stones or Fletching Stations.
bannerbound.jei.info.campfire: In unclaimed land, a newly placed campfire starts unlit. Right-click it to found a settlement; later, the lit campfire acts as the town hall.
bannerbound.workshop_rod.hint: Right-click two corners to mark a workshop. Shift-right-click inside one to manage it. Shift-left-click a box to remove it.
bannerbound.workshop_rod.point_a_set: Corner A set at (%s, %s, %s). Click the opposite corner.
bannerbound.workshop_rod.no_workshop_her: No workshop here. Mark one with two corner clicks first.
bannerbound.workshop_rod.no_settlement: This area doesn't belong to a settlement.
bannerbound.workshop_rod.too_big: Workshop is too large — max %s blocks per side.
bannerbound.workshop_rod.disconnected: That box doesn't touch the rest of the workshop.
bannerbound.workshop_rod.no_work_block: A workshop needs a work block inside (e.g. a Fletching Station or Crafting Stone).
bannerbound.workshop_rod.overlap_conflic: That box overlaps another marked area.
bannerbound.workshop_rod.no_box_here: No workshop box here to remove.
bannerbound.workshop_rod.workshop_remove: Last box removed — %s deleted, workers unassigned.
bannerbound.housing_orders.hint: Right-click two corners to mark a home (the first box needs a bed). Shift-right-click inside one to manage it. Shift-left-click a box to remove it.
bannerbound.housing_orders.point_a_set: Corner A set at (%s, %s, %s). Click the opposite corner.
bannerbound.housing_orders.no_home_here: No home here. Mark one with two corner clicks around a bed first.
bannerbound.housing_orders.no_settlement: This area doesn't belong to a settlement.
bannerbound.housing_orders.too_big: Home is too large — max %s blocks per side.
bannerbound.housing_orders.disconnected: That box doesn't touch the rest of the home.
bannerbound.housing_orders.no_bed: A home needs a bed inside the first box.
bannerbound.housing_orders.overlap_confl: That box overlaps another marked area.
bannerbound.housing_orders.no_box_here: No home box here to remove.
bannerbound.housing_orders.home_removed: Last box removed — home deleted, residents evicted.
bannerbound.workshop.title: Workshop
bannerbound.workshop.station_busy: Someone is working here right now.
bannerbound.workshop.assign_locked: %s needs its craft researched before a worker can be assigned here.
bannerbound.workshop.assign_locked_tip: Research this craft before workers can be assigned here.
bannerbound.citizen.job.tool_storage_too: Where this worker type's tools are kept. Workers equip from here first, and stockers deliver hauled or crafted-to-order tools here.
bannerbound.citizen.job.tool_storage_hin: Right-click a chest, basket or stockpile to set it
bannerbound.citizen.job.tool_storage_set: Tool storage set for this worker type.
bannerbound.citizen.job.no_tasks: No hauls queued — the board refreshes as workshops need supplies.
bannerbound.thought.lovely_workplace: I love working in such a lovely workshop.
bannerbound.workshop.picker_none: No workshops marked yet — use the Workshop Orders rod first.
bannerbound.workshop.status.no_storage: No storage inside (chest, barrel, or basket)
bannerbound.workshop.status.work_block_u: Citizens can't reach a work block — clear a path
bannerbound.workshop.status.storage_unre: Citizens can't reach the storage — clear a path
bannerbound.workshop.status.no_headroom: Roof is too low over the work block — citizens need two blocks of headroom
bannerbound.workshop.status.missing_heat: Missing heat source for this craft
bannerbound.workshop.status.missing_craf: Missing crafting surface for this craft
bannerbound.workshop.status.missing_tool: Missing a required tool in storage (e.g. a saw)
bannerbound.workshop.status.missing_curi: Missing a clay tank to cure hides (fill it with curing liquid)
bannerbound.fletching.title: Fletching
bannerbound.configuration.title: Bannerbound: Core Configs
bannerbound.settle.title: Found a Settlement
bannerbound.settle.site.good: This looks like a good place to settle.
bannerbound.settle.site.no_water: ⚠ No water nearby — fishing and livestock will suffer.
bannerbound.settle.site.poor_soil: ⚠ Barren ground — little grass for foraging or farming.
bannerbound.settle.error.already: You already belong to a settlement.
bannerbound.settle.error.name_taken: That settlement name is already taken.
bannerbound.settle.error.name_invalid: Invalid name. Use 3-24 letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, underscores, or apostrophes.
bannerbound.settle.error.too_close: Too close to another settlement. Move at least 6 chunks away from any other settlement's claimed chunks.
bannerbound.settle.error.too_close_city_: Too close to a city-state. You cannot settle on or beside a city-state's territory — move further away.
bannerbound.settle.error.color_taken: That banner color is already taken by another settlement.
bannerbound.leave.success: You have left the settlement of %s.
bannerbound.leave.error.not_in_settlemen: You are not in a settlement.
bannerbound.leave.must_step_down: You can't leave while you're Chief — step down first.
bannerbound.leave.cooldown: You just settled in — you can't leave for another %s.
bannerbound.join.error.already_in_settle: You already belong to a settlement. Leave it first.
bannerbound.townhall.already_in_settleme: You already belong to a settlement.
bannerbound.townhall.not_the_townhall: This isn't your settlement's town hall.
bannerbound.townhall.placement.already_h: Your settlement already has a town hall.
bannerbound.townhall.placement.set_as_to: Town hall set for your settlement.
bannerbound.townhall.placement.not_your_: Cannot place a town hall in %s's territory.
bannerbound.townhall.destroyed: The town hall of %s has been destroyed.
bannerbound.protection.cannot_break: You cannot break blocks in %s's territory.
bannerbound.protection.cannot_place: You cannot place blocks in %s's territory.
bannerbound.protection.cannot_attack: You cannot harm anything in %s's territory.
bannerbound.protection.projectile_blocke: Your projectile was blocked by %s's territory.
bannerbound.protection.cannot_open: You cannot use %s's containers unless you are at war.
bannerbound.building.error.no_interior: Town hall has no air adjacent to flood through. Place it inside a room.
bannerbound.building.error.no_roof: No roof above (%s, %s, %s). The town hall building needs a ceiling.
bannerbound.building.error.too_large: Building isn't enclosed near (%s, %s, %s). Check for a wall gap.
bannerbound.townhall.promoted: This campfire is now the town hall of %s.
bannerbound.townhall.already_have_one: Your settlement already has a town hall.
bannerbound.banner.raised: The banner of %s flies! The settlement is bound to it.
bannerbound.banner.taken_down: %s took down the faction banner. The settlement is unbound — no menus, no work — until it is raised again.
bannerbound.banner.required: Your public standard is missing or invalid. Raise the official banner within 24 blocks of the town hall with a clear access side to restore command.
bannerbound.banner.no_spot: No clear ground beside the campfire for your faction banner — place one from your supplies nearby.
bannerbound.status.banner_lost: Faction banner lost! Plant a new banner in your territory.
bannerbound.banner.editor.title: Faction Banner
bannerbound.banner.editor.take_copy.tip: Costs one of each dye in the design (base + patterns), drawn from your settlement's storage.
bannerbound.banner.editor.copy_given: A copy of the faction banner is yours — plant it anywhere for decoration.
bannerbound.banner.editor.copy_no_dyes: Your settlement's storage is missing the dyes this banner needs: %s.
bannerbound.banner.editor.points_hint: Culture researches grant more Heraldry points.
bannerbound.banner.editor.identity_prima: Primary: %s — the banner's dominant color becomes your settlement's color when you save.
bannerbound.banner.editor.identity_secon: Accent: %s — the runner-up color, used for trim and gradients across your settlement's menus.
bannerbound.banner.editor.identity_terti: Trim: %s — the third color, completing your settlement's gradients.
bannerbound.banner.editor.saved: The faction banner design is sealed — the flag and every future banner bear it.
bannerbound.banner.editor.no_permission: You don't have the authority to change the faction banner.
bannerbound.banner.editor.no_points: Not enough Heraldry points for that many layers.
bannerbound.townhall.menu.title: Town Hall
bannerbound.disband.vote.started: %s started a vote on disbanding the colony! Vote at the town center. Expires in 3 minutes.
bannerbound.disband.vote.passed: Disband vote passed unanimously. Settlement disbanding...
bannerbound.territory.title: Expand Territory
bannerbound.territory.cap_reached: Era cap reached. Advance era to claim more.
bannerbound.territory.click_to_claim: Click an adjacent chunk to claim.
bannerbound.territory.error.no_settlemen: You must be in a settlement with a Town Hall.
bannerbound.territory.error.no_cost_data: No expansion cost data for this era.
bannerbound.territory.error.cap_reached: Your era's expansion cap is reached.
bannerbound.territory.error.missing_item: You don't have the required items.
bannerbound.townhall.citizens.title: Citizens
bannerbound.townhall.food_deposit.not_yo: You can only deposit food at your own town hall.
bannerbound.townhall.food_deposit.reject: That food is not safe for the settlement.
bannerbound.townhall.food_tooltip.pionee: Founding settlers forage to grow the camp.
bannerbound.townhall.food_tooltip.gate_s: Surplus — the settlement can take in newcomers.
bannerbound.townhall.food_tooltip.gate_d: Deficit — growth pauses until food production recovers.
bannerbound.townhall.culture_tooltip.app: Beautify your claimed chunks to raise it; ugly blocks drag it down.
bannerbound.laws.enacting: It is time to enact the code of laws.
bannerbound.faith.founding_unlocked: The people look to the heavens and the old stones. A Faith may be founded — gather at the town hall.
bannerbound.faith.founded: The faith of %s is founded, in the way of %s.
bannerbound.faith.adopted: The settlement embraces the faith of %s.
bannerbound.faith.vote.divided: The people are divided — no faith was chosen. The vote begins anew.
bannerbound.faith.choose.title: Choose a Faith
bannerbound.faith.choose.subtitle: Found a new faith, or adopt one. Majority wins.
bannerbound.faith.name.required: A faith must be named before it can be founded.
bannerbound.faith.abandon_progress: %s of %s needed have voted to abandon the faith.
bannerbound.faith.cooldown: The people are not yet ready to believe again.
bannerbound.faith.pantheon_full: The pantheon is full — expand it through faith research.
bannerbound.pantheon.uncharted: The stars are not yet charted — research Star Charts.
bannerbound.pantheon.list.title: The Pantheon
bannerbound.pantheon.list.empty: No gods have been drawn yet.
bannerbound.faith.constellation.forgotte: %s is forgotten. The constellation %s fades from the sky.
bannerbound.pantheon.entered: The heavens open. Connect the stars, and name what you find.
bannerbound.pantheon.no_sky: You must stand under the open sky.
bannerbound.pantheon.hud.title: Pantheon Mode — %s/%s stars
bannerbound.pantheon.hud.legend: LMB connect · RMB/R undo · Enter name · Esc leave
bannerbound.pantheon.name.title: Name the Constellation
bannerbound.pantheon.name.no_typed: No colored stars — every god needs a domain.
bannerbound.faith.constellation.name_req: The constellation and its god must both be named.
bannerbound.faith.constellation.star_tak: The heavens have shifted — a chosen star already belongs to a god.
bannerbound.faith.constellation.name_tak: That name is already written in this faith's sky.
bannerbound.faith.constellation.no_typed: A god needs at least one colored star.
bannerbound.faith.constellation.devotion: Not enough devotion — %s is needed to raise this god.
bannerbound.faith.constellation.confirme: %s ascends. The constellation %s burns in the night sky.
bannerbound.faith.vote.leader_only: The faith is the leader's to choose.
bannerbound.faith.info.title: Faith
bannerbound.government.council.solo_tool: Multiple players are required for a council.
bannerbound.government.choose.title: Choose a Government
bannerbound.government.choose.subtitle: Cast your vote. Majority wins.
bannerbound.government.vote.not_open: The government-choice window isn't open yet.
bannerbound.government.vote.paused: Government selection paused — population dropped below the immigration floor.
bannerbound.chief.election.title: Elect a Chief
bannerbound.chief.election.subtitle: Click a member to nominate them.
bannerbound.chief.election.started: The Chiefdom has been declared. Cast your nomination for Chief.
bannerbound.chief.election.not_open: There is no active Chief election.
bannerbound.chief.election.bad_candidate: That player isn't a member of this settlement.
bannerbound.townhall.warnings.heading: Warnings
bannerbound.townhall.chief_only_hint: Only the Chief may issue orders.
bannerbound.townhall.chief_only_action: Only the Chief may do this.
bannerbound.research.error.prereq_or_bus: Can't start that — a research is already active or its prerequisites aren't met.
bannerbound.research.unsuggested: %s withdrew their suggestion for %s in the %s.
bannerbound.territory.vote.no_resources: Vote passed on chunk (%s, %s) but nobody had the resources — vote cleared.
bannerbound.research.chief_only: Only the Chief may direct research. Click a node to suggest it instead.
bannerbound.tribe_vote.title: Tribe vote
bannerbound.vote.locked.subtitle: Your vote is final. Waiting for the others.
bannerbound.citizen.happiness.red.title: Miserable
bannerbound.warning.dusk_header: As night falls, unrest stirs in the settlement:
bannerbound.warning.homeless: %s citizen(s) still have no home — their resentment deepens each day.
bannerbound.warning.strike_risk: %s worker(s) are unhappy enough to refuse work tomorrow.
bannerbound.warning.coup_imminent: The people may rise against the Chief at dawn!
bannerbound.chief.coup: The citizens have deposed %s. %s now leads.
bannerbound.chief.coup.vote_called: The citizens have lost faith in %s. They will choose a new leader.
bannerbound.chief.regent_installed: %s is filling in as regent while the Chief is away.
bannerbound.chief.quit.broadcast: %s has stepped down as Chief. A new leader must be chosen.
bannerbound.chief.quit.not_chiefdom: You can't step down — this settlement isn't a Chiefdom.
bannerbound.chief.quit.not_chief: Only the seated Chief can step down.
bannerbound.chief.quit.cooldown: You must lead for at least 20 minutes before stepping down (%s left).
bannerbound.chat.too_far: %s is too far away to hear you.
bannerbound.citizen.exile.error.not_memb: You aren't a member of this citizen's settlement.
bannerbound.citizen.no_workstations: No workstations exist in this settlement.
bannerbound.citizen.job.auto_tooltip: Job pinned by you — labor balancer won't touch them. Click to release.
bannerbound.citizen.job.anarchy_hint: No government: ask citizens to switch jobs (may refuse) or set drop-offs. Form one for direct command.
bannerbound.citizen.job.switch_refused_t: They just refused a switch — give them a minute before asking again.
bannerbound.citizen.job.extras_tooltip: Kept: forester stores saplings, apples, sticks. Logs only: leaves cleared, drops discarded.
bannerbound.citizen.job.pen_hint: Mark a fenced pen with the Foreman's Rod.
bannerbound.citizen.job.no_rod_tooltip: No Foreman's Rod in player inventory.
bannerbound.citizen.job.plantation_locke: Research Silviculture to manage tree plantations.
bannerbound.research.effect.forester_pla: Foresters can tend ordered tree plantations
bannerbound.job.foresters_log.desc: Fells trees and hauls logs to the drop-off. Order a plantation to keep it local.
bannerbound.job.farmers_granary.desc: Tills, plants and harvests marked fields, stocking the granary.
bannerbound.job.fishers_creel.desc: Fishes nearby water and drops the catch at the marked storage.
bannerbound.job.foragers_basket.desc: Gathers wild plants and food from the land; pick what it collects.
bannerbound.job.herders_pen.desc: Raises and breeds penned animals, culling surplus into harvest storage.
bannerbound.job.hunters_camp.desc: Hunts wild animals on unclaimed land; choose which prey to pursue.
bannerbound.job.diggers_slab.desc: Clears and mines blocks inside areas you mark with the Foreman's Rod.
bannerbound.job.miners_claim.desc: Mines ore from claimed underground veins.
bannerbound.job.stocker.desc: Hauls goods between stores and workshops to fill the settlement's orders.
bannerbound.job.crafter.desc: Works a bound workshop, crafting its orders and gaining skill.
bannerbound.hunter.picker.title: Prey
bannerbound.job.guards_post.desc: Patrols the settlement's borders and fights off raiders and hostile mobs — far steadier in a brawl than an ordinary citizen, and won't be drawn off into the wild.
bannerbound.townhall.walls.hint1: Preview shows where walls, corners and gates will stand on your territory border. Click the line to place gates, then Construct.
bannerbound.townhall.walls.hint2: The Designer lets you author your culture's wall, corner and gate designs in 3D — the layout adapts them to any territory shape.
bannerbound.townhall.walls.hint3: Builders with a marked drop-off will raise the wall from your stockpiles; you can always build by hand following the ghost blocks.
bannerbound.wall_designer.title: Wall Designer
bannerbound.wall_designer.step.tooltip: Left-click steps up, right-click steps down.
bannerbound.wall_designer.build.tooltip: Build mode — click to place the picked block (B). Hold K to eyedrop a placed block.
bannerbound.wall_designer.select.tooltip: Select mode — click or drag to select placed blocks (V).
bannerbound.wall_designer.owned_only.too: Only list blocks your settlement has unlocked.
bannerbound.wall_designer.wall_context.t: Show ghost copies of the neighboring wall pieces around the one you are editing.
bannerbound.wall_designer.design_name.to: A new name saves a NEW design in your library; keeping the name overwrites it.
bannerbound.wall_designer.save_set_activ: Saves the designs on all three tabs and makes them your settlement's active wall style.
bannerbound.wall_refine.title: Wall Refinement
bannerbound.wall_refine.reset_height.too: Reset the selected piece back to its design height.
bannerbound.wall_refine.variant_cycle.to: Cycle the selected piece through the design's saved variants.
bannerbound.wall_refine.foundation_toggl: Toggle the foundation fill under the selected piece.
bannerbound.wall_refine.construct.toolti: Order your builders to raise the walls as previewed.
bannerbound.wall_preview.ghosts.tooltip: Show the planned wall as ghost blocks in the world — walk around and inspect gates before committing. Nothing is built or spent.
bannerbound.wall_preview.construct.toolt: Commit the plan: ghost blocks mark the line in the world, builders start fetching and building. Needs at least one gate.
bannerbound.wall_preview.cancel_plan.too: Drop the committed plan. Standing wall blocks are remembered and queued for demolition + refund.
bannerbound.wall_preview.refine.tooltip: Rotating 3D god-view of the planned wall — select pieces and raise/lower their tops, place gates. The auto layout is just the first draft.
bannerbound.wall_preview.designs.tooltip: Open the Wall Designer — author your wall, corner and gate designs in 3D. Your work autosaves as a draft.
bannerbound.job.work_area_bound: Foreman's Rod set to this digger. Select an area with it.
bannerbound.job.need_rod_msg: You need a Foreman's Rod in your inventory.
bannerbound.job.drop_invalid: That isn't a valid drop-off in your territory.
bannerbound.job.drop_not_researched: Your settlement hasn't researched that storage type yet.
bannerbound.job.tool_too_advanced: That tool is too advanced for your current tool age.
bannerbound.citizen.job.no_axes: No usable tools in your inventory.
bannerbound.citizen.relationships.empty: No one to talk about yet.
bannerbound.thought.unemployed: I don't feel like I'm helping.
bannerbound.thought.no_home: I don't have a place to call home.
bannerbound.thought.child_curious: Mom said not to stray far. But my curiosity is killing me!
bannerbound.thought.child_muddy_puddle: I splashed in a muddy puddle.
bannerbound.thought.child_found_pebble: I found a really cool pebble.
bannerbound.workstation.child_cannot_wor: Children can't be assigned to a workstation.
bannerbound.workstation.anarchy_rejectio: No code of laws — citizens won't obey assignments yet.
bannerbound.thought.friend_died: A friend of mine, %s, died recently.
bannerbound.thought.close_friend_died: A close friend of mine, %s, died recently.
bannerbound.thought.friend_for_life_died: My friend for life, %s, died recently.
bannerbound.thought.family_died: A member of my family, %s, died recently.
bannerbound.house.screen.title: House
bannerbound.house.space.tip.title: Living space
bannerbound.house.space.tip.value: %1$s blocks of enclosed room shared between %2$s bed(s) — %3$s blocks each.
bannerbound.house.space.tip.explain: Roomier homes are more comfortable; crowding beds into a small space lowers happiness.
bannerbound.house.demand.lighting.tip: Place a torch, lantern, or other bright light source inside the home.
bannerbound.house.demand.storage.tip: Place a chest or barrel inside the home.
bannerbound.house.demand.campfire.tip: Build and light a campfire inside the home.
bannerbound.house.demand.cooked_food.tip: Keep cooked food in the home's own chest or barrel.
bannerbound.house.demand.charcoal.tip: Keep charcoal in the home's own chest or barrel.
bannerbound.house.picker.title: Assign Residents
bannerbound.house.picker.no_citizens: No citizens in this settlement yet.
bannerbound.house.assign.not_valid: This house isn't ready for residents yet (not enclosed or no beds).
bannerbound.house.assign.full: This house has no spare beds.
bannerbound.house.status.unmarked: Unmarked — use Housing Orders to mark which blocks belong to this house.
bannerbound.house.status.broken_no_house: Broken — the marking doesn't include this House Block. The House Block must be inside its own house.
bannerbound.house.status.broken_disconne: Broken — the marked blocks form more than one separate structure.
bannerbound.house.status.broken_not_encl: Broken — the marked region isn't enclosed (missing walls or roof).
bannerbound.house.status.broken_too_big: Too big for your era — research larger homes, or build smaller, to make this a working home.
bannerbound.house.status.no_beds: Marked, but no beds inside (place a bed inside the marked region).
bannerbound.house.detect.success: Detected the house structure (%s boxes). Use the Home Marker Rod to fine-tune.
bannerbound.house.detect.no_house: That isn't a House Block anymore.
bannerbound.house.detect.no_territory: This House Block isn't in your settlement's claimed territory.
bannerbound.house.detect.no_home: This House Block has no home record yet.
bannerbound.house.detect.no_interior: Couldn't find an interior next to the House Block — make sure it's inside an enclosed space.
bannerbound.house.detect.open_wall: Couldn't find an enclosed house — there's an open wall or a gap too big to be a window.
bannerbound.house.detect.too_big: This house is too big for your era — research larger homes, or build smaller.
bannerbound.home_marker_rod.bind_hint: Shift-right-click a House Block to bind this rod.
bannerbound.home_marker_rod.already_boun: Already bound to a home. Shift-right-click in air to unbind first.
bannerbound.home_marker_rod.point_a_set: Point A: (%s, %s, %s) — right-click another block for B.
bannerbound.home_marker_rod.too_long: Box too long: %s blocks in one axis (max %s).
bannerbound.home_marker_rod.too_far: Box too far from the House Block: %s blocks (max %s).
bannerbound.home_marker_rod.no_solids: Box contains only air. Mark around actual blocks.
bannerbound.home_marker_rod.must_include: The marking must include the House Block.
bannerbound.home_marker_rod.disconnected: Box would leave the marking disconnected. Boxes must connect to the rest of the house.
bannerbound.home_marker_rod.overlap_conf: Overlaps another home or workstation selection.
bannerbound.home_marker_rod.home_gone: The bound house no longer exists. Binding cleared.
bannerbound.home_marker_rod.no_box_here: No marked box at this position.
bannerbound.forager.picker.title: Targets
bannerbound.forager.picker.hint: Click to choose what the forager gathers
bannerbound.research.shearing.name: Shearing
bannerbound.research.shearing.descriptio: Sharpen flint into a crude blade and the forest opens up.
bannerbound.research.effect.allow_sheari: Foragers can gather vines, grass, and leaves
bannerbound.stockpile.enclosure_invalid: Enclosure: invalid — needs fences/walls, a fence gate & a roof
bannerbound.stockpile.status.unmarked: Stockpile — place it inside a fenced, roofed area to activate.
bannerbound.stockpile.status.not_enclose: Stockpile — not enclosed. A solid block is breaking the fence/wall ring.
bannerbound.stockpile.status.no_gate: Stockpile — needs a fence gate so citizens can walk in.
bannerbound.stockpile.status.no_roof: Stockpile — needs a roof to shelter the goods from the weather.
bannerbound.stockpile.status.too_large: Stockpile — the enclosed area is too large, or the fence ring has a gap.
bannerbound.stockpile.status.no_containe: Stockpile — enclosed, but empty. Place chests, barrels, or baskets inside (up to %2$s).
bannerbound.stockpile.status.too_many: Stockpile — too many containers (%1$s); only %2$s are connected.
bannerbound.stockpile.error.no_access: Only owners or active-war enemies can use this stockpile.
bannerbound.stockpile.error.not_research: Your settlement hasn't researched Storage Logistics yet.
bannerbound.building.error.another_works: There's already another workstation in this building.
bannerbound.research.treasure_fishing.de: Master fishers occasionally pull up treasures and curiosities from the deep.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.guard_post_mark: Guard post marked. A guard will man it.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.guard_post_alre: There is already a guard post here. Shift-right-click to reassign its guard, shift-left-click to remove it.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.mine_marked: %s deposit marked. A miner will work it.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.mine_already_ma: This %s deposit is already marked. Shift-right-click to reassign its miner.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.mine_no_deposit: No workable ore deposit in this chunk.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.mine_unworkable: Your people don't know how to work this deposit yet.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.deposit_marked: %s deposit marked. Diggers will work it.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.deposit_unworka: Your people don't know how to work this deposit yet.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.deposit_outpost: Outposts manage their own material deposit — right-click the Outpost Banner to appoint a digger.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.pen_marked: Pen marked. A herder will tend it.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.pen_keep_set: Keeping %s adults; surplus adults are harvested.
bannerbound.pen_keep.title: Herd & harvest
bannerbound.pen_keep.explain_auto: Breed up to the pen's full %s and never harvest — biggest herd, no meat.
bannerbound.pen_keep.explain_cull: Harvest %1$s surplus now → meat for the larder. Herd holds at %2$s.
bannerbound.pen_keep.explain_room: Keep up to %s adults — the herd grows toward it, then surplus is harvested for meat.
bannerbound.pen_animal_picker.title: Raise which animal?
bannerbound.foremans_rod.pen_no_gate: Pen needs a fence gate to get in and out.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.pen_no_water: Pen needs water inside (a drinking spot).
bannerbound.foremans_rod.pen_no_grass: Pen needs grass inside for grazing.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.pen_not_enclose: No enclosed pen here — fence it in fully first.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.pen_not_livesto: This chunk has no livestock to raise.
bannerbound.seed_picker.title: Choose a Seed
bannerbound.field_edit.title: Edit Field
bannerbound.farmer.tilling_complete: Farmer is awaiting a seed for the selection at %s, %s, %s
bannerbound.foremans_rod.no_workstation: Shift-right-click to pick a workstation type first.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.no_point_a: Left-click a block to set point A first.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.not_in_settleme: You must belong to a settlement to use this rod.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.not_researched: Your settlement hasn't researched that worker yet.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.outside_territo: Selection must be entirely within your settlement's claimed chunks.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.foreign_territo: That land belongs to another settlement.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.quarry_too_far: Too far from your territory for a remote quarry (max %s chunks out).
bannerbound.foremans_rod.no_selection_he: No selection here. Shift-left-click inside one of your selections to remove it.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.tooltip.expand_: Sneak + right-click to expand an adjacent field instead of making a new one.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.picker.title: Choose Workstation
bannerbound.foremans_rod.tooltip.no_sele: Ready — right-click a block to set Point A
bannerbound.foremans_rod.tooltip.a_only: Point A: %s, %s, %s (right-click another block for Point B to commit)
bannerbound.workstation.fertilizer_locke: Research Fertilization to let this farmer apply bone meal to crops.
bannerbound.forester.prefers.hint: Click to choose a log type
bannerbound.workstation.error.not_claime: This workstation isn't inside any settlement's territory.
bannerbound.fertilizing.locked: Your settlement hasn't learned to use fertilizer yet.
bannerbound.vanilla.portal_locked: The old ways into the Nether and the End are closed to you.
bannerbound.barbarian.camp_cleared: %s has been cleared — its standard razed and its commanders slain.
bannerbound.barbarian.envoy_arrived: An envoy from %s has arrived at %s. Right-click them to parley.
bannerbound.barbarian.barter.help.title: Worth
bannerbound.barbarian.barter.help.1: Every good is valued by the camp. Hover an item to see its worth.
bannerbound.barbarian.barter.help.2: They accept once your offer's worth meets their asking value.
bannerbound.barbarian.barter.rejected: They reject your terms and leave, insulted.
bannerbound.barbarian.barter.grace_grant: %s grants you two days. "I'll be back. You'd better have it."
bannerbound.barbarian.parley.greeting.no: Greetings, settler. We are traders of the dunes — what will you barter today?
bannerbound.barbarian.parley.greeting.tr: The jungle is ours. Feed us, and we may let your people be.
bannerbound.barbarian.parley.greeting.ra: Your herds are fat. Hand over meat, or we will come and take it — and more.
bannerbound.barbarian.parley.greeting.ma: We are the storm at your gates. Pay tribute and live a while longer.
bannerbound.barbarian.parley.not_for_you: This envoy was not sent to your settlement.
bannerbound.barbarian.parley.cant_pay: You don't have what they asked for.
bannerbound.barbarian.parley.tribute_ok: The tribute is accepted. Relations are now %s.
bannerbound.barbarian.parley.tribute_mar: The Barbarians take your tribute and withdraw — for now.
bannerbound.barbarian.parley.refused: You refuse. The envoy leaves with threats.
bannerbound.citystate.war.declared: War on %s has been declared by %s — it begins shortly.
bannerbound.citystate.war.started: War with %s has begun! Its mercenaries will defend it.
bannerbound.citystate.standard_taken: You tore down the standard of %s! Carry it to your town hall to capture the city-state.
bannerbound.citystate.standard_returned: The standard of %s was recovered — its banner stands again.
bannerbound.citystate.captured: You have captured %s! Decide its fate from the Diplomacy tab.
bannerbound.barbarian.raid_watch_asleep: Your watch was asleep in their beds — the horn wakes them, but the Night Watch policy keeps guards on the border all night.
bannerbound.barbarian.raid_repelled: Raid repelled — %s has been driven back, and will return in greater force.
bannerbound.research.effect.allow_planti: Allows planting saplings, tilling farmland, and sowing seeds
bannerbound.research.effect.allow_tradin: Allows trading with other settlements via the Town Hall Diplomacy tab
bannerbound.research.effect.foresters_re: Foresters replant chopped trees with a matching sapling
bannerbound.research.effect.allow_paving: Allows shovel-flattening dirt and grass into paths
bannerbound.research.effect.allow_leashi: Allows leashing animals with fiber rope
bannerbound.research.effect.allow_fertil: Farmers can apply bone meal to speed up crop growth
bannerbound.research.effect.large_tree_c: Foresters can fell mega trees (dark oak, mega spruce, giant jungle)
bannerbound.research.effect.unlock_quarr: Upgrades Diggers into Quarryworkers, letting them mine stone, granite, diorite, andesite, tuff, and coal ore
bannerbound.research.effect.unlock_treas: Fishers in open water can pull treasure and junk, not just fish
bannerbound.research.effect.unlock.guard: Unlocks the Guard — a settlement watch that patrols the borders and fights raiders
bannerbound.research.title: Research
bannerbound.research.error.not_in_settle: You must belong to a settlement to research.
bannerbound.research.error.age_locked: Your settlement isn't advanced enough for this research yet.
bannerbound.disband.success: The settlement of %s has been disbanded.
bannerbound.disband.error.not_in_settlem: You aren't in a settlement to disband.
bannerbound.disband.error.under_attack: You can't disband while your settlement is under attack — survive the raid or make peace first.
bannerbound.disband.confirm: Disbanding %s will permanently remove its citizens and claims. Press Disband again to confirm.
bannerbound.tablet.received: You received a Registration Tablet for %s.
bannerbound.paper.received: You received a Registration Paper for %s.
bannerbound.tablet.tooltip.blank: Blank — get one from a town hall.
bannerbound.tablet.error.already_issued: Your settlement has already issued a Registration Tablet. (Future research will unlock more.)
bannerbound.unknown_item.name: Unknown item
bannerbound.unknown_item.action: You don't know what this does yet.
bannerbound.settlement.set_age.error.inv: Unknown era '%s'. Valid: antiquity, medieval, renaissance, industrial, diesel, atomic, modern, future.
bannerbound.command.reset_world_age.succ: World age reset to Antiquity. Discovered-research set cleared.
bannerbound.research.effect.statistics: Unlocks the Town Hall Statistics tab
bannerbound.townhall.labor.auto_tooltip: On: auto-distribute by priority. Off (gov only): hand-assign each citizen.
bannerbound.townhall.labor.reorder_toolt: Reorder to adjust how many workers each job gets. Citizens re-skill over time.
bannerbound.townhall.labor.toggle_toolti: Toggle this job. Off: zero workers, re-skill them to others.
bannerbound.townhall.labor.cap_tooltip: Worker cap for this job. -1 = no limit. Surplus workers cascade to other jobs.
bannerbound.townhall.labor.preferred_sto: Default depot for gatherers without their own drop-off — they deposit here and draw their job tool from it. Click to pick a chest or stockpile.
Click a chest or stockpile in your territory
bannerbound.townhall.dictionary.title: Settlement Lexicon
bannerbound.townhall.diplomacy.keep_disa: You cannot expand your faction yet.
bannerbound.trade.subtitle: Settlement trade
bannerbound.trade.short_goods: Your stockpile can't back this offer
bannerbound.trade.judged_by_you: A deal is whatever both sides agree to
bannerbound.trade.state.fresh: Compose an offer from the two pools below
bannerbound.trade.state.awaiting_you: Their terms await your answer — accept, counter, or reject
bannerbound.trade.state.countering: Adjust the terms below, then send your counter
bannerbound.trade.state.gathering: Agreed — both sides are gathering the goods
bannerbound.trade.proposed_incoming: %s proposes a trade — review it in the Town Hall Diplomacy tab.
bannerbound.trade.countered: %s counters your trade offer — review the new terms in the Town Hall.
bannerbound.trade.accepted: Trade with %s agreed — goods are being gathered from the trading stockpiles.
bannerbound.trade.cancelled: The trade with %s was called off.
bannerbound.trade.expired: The trade offer with %s lapsed unanswered.
bannerbound.trade.partner_gone: The other settlement is gone — the trade fell through.
bannerbound.trade.departed: The shipments to and from %s are on the road.
bannerbound.trade.courier_departed: %s set out for %s carrying the trade goods.
bannerbound.trade.no_courier: No trading courier was available — the goods travel by convoy.
bannerbound.trade.courier_fallback: Your courier couldn't complete the journey — the goods continue by convoy.
bannerbound.trade.courier_killed_yours: Your trade courier %s was killed on the road — the cargo lies where they fell.
bannerbound.trade.courier_killed: %s's trade courier was killed on the road — their side of the deal is lost.
bannerbound.trade.partial: The trade with %s ended incomplete — one shipment never arrived.
bannerbound.citizen.job.trading_tooltip: A Trading stocker may be sent to carry agreed trade goods to the partner settlement — a real journey on foot. It resumes normal stocking when it returns.
bannerbound.trade.delivered_in: A trade shipment arrived at your trading stockpile.
bannerbound.trade.failed_short: %s failed to gather the agreed goods in time — the trade fell through and your goods were returned.
bannerbound.trade.failed_short_yours: Your settlement failed to gather the agreed goods in time — the trade fell through.
bannerbound.trade.overflow: Trade goods didn't fit your trading stockpile — the remainder was left at the town hall.
bannerbound.trade.error.not_chief: Only the chief may negotiate trades.
bannerbound.trade.error.gate: You can't trade with them right now (Bartering research, peace, and a trading stockpile are required on both sides).
bannerbound.trade.error.deal_exists: There is already an open deal with this settlement — resolve it first.
bannerbound.trade.error.short_goods: Your trading stockpiles can't back that offer.
bannerbound.trade.error.they_lack: They don't have what you're asking for.
bannerbound.vote.trade.started: %s puts a trade with %s to a quick vote —
bannerbound.townhall.diplomacy.annex_loc: Requires a free settlement slot (unlocked by Feudalism).
bannerbound.vote.tablet.started: %s wants to issue a registration tablet.
bannerbound.vote.paper.started: %s wants to issue a registration paper.
bannerbound.vote.tablet.initiator_offlin: The vote passed, but the requester went offline — no document was issued.
bannerbound.citizen.exile.error.anarchy: No one holds the authority to exile in anarchy. Form a government.
bannerbound.suggest.ignored: The chief has chosen to ignore your suggestion to %s.
bannerbound.diplomacy.error.already_war: You are already at war with %s, warning them, or resolving their capture.
bannerbound.diplomacy.error.winner_coold: Your settlement cannot start new wars for %s.
bannerbound.diplomacy.error.cooldown: You cannot redeclare war on %s for %s.
bannerbound.diplomacy.error.target_offli: %s has no online members. War cannot be declared yet.
bannerbound.diplomacy.error.captured_no_: %s is captured. Resolve the conquest instead.
bannerbound.diplomacy.error.rally_no_war: Your citizens can only be rallied while at war or under raid.
bannerbound.diplomacy.war.warning_attack: War warning sent to %s. War begins in 1 minute if they stay online.
bannerbound.diplomacy.war.warning_defend: %s is preparing to declare war. War begins in 1 minute.
bannerbound.diplomacy.rally.on: Citizens rally to defend the settlement.
bannerbound.diplomacy.standard.locked: You cannot move your public standard during a war warning or active war.
bannerbound.diplomacy.standard.cannot_re: Your standard is stolen or captured. Recover it before raising another.
bannerbound.diplomacy.standard.no_place: A stolen standard cannot be placed.
bannerbound.diplomacy.standard.not_enemy: That standard belongs to a settlement you are not at war with.
bannerbound.diplomacy.standard.pickup_bl: Only active-war enemies of %s can carry this standard.
bannerbound.diplomacy.standard.score_nee: Your own public standard must be standing and valid to score.
bannerbound.diplomacy.capture.scored_att: %s has been captured. Choose Raze in Diplomacy to finish it.
bannerbound.diplomacy.capture.scored_def: %s captured your public standard. Your settlement is awaiting resolution.
bannerbound.policy.vote.rejected: The policy vote did not pass.
bannerbound.policy.opinionated.bonus: The tribe stands behind the decision — spirits lift.
bannerbound.policy.opinionated.refused: The tribe refuses to back this — the vote fails.
bannerbound.policy.error.no_slot: No free policy slot — remove one first.
bannerbound.policy.error.chief_only: Only the Chief may change policies.
bannerbound.policy.error.vote_in_progres: A policy change is already being voted on.
bannerbound.workstation.chief_only: Only the Chief may assign jobs here.
bannerbound.palette.vote.rejected: The palette vote did not pass.
bannerbound.palette.error.no_slot: No free palette slot — remove one first.
bannerbound.palette.error.chief_only: Only the Chief may change palettes.
bannerbound.palette.error.vote_in_progre: A palette change is already being voted on.
bannerbound.policy.nightshift.name: Extended Shift
bannerbound.policy.nightshift.descriptio: Citizens keep working past dusk and skip socializing before bed.
bannerbound.policy.workload_share.name: Workload Share
bannerbound.policy.workload_share.descri: Any settlement member can assign citizens to jobs, not just the Chief.
bannerbound.policy.opinionated_crowd.des: Major votes also poll the tribe. When the tribe agrees with the council, morale surges.
bannerbound.policy.opinionated_crowd.eff: On agreement: +25 compliance, -10 resentment for 10 minutes.
bannerbound.policy.domestication.name: Domestication
bannerbound.policy.domestication.descrip: Citizens adopt wandering wolves as settlement pets.
bannerbound.policy.domestication.effect: All citizens: +15 happiness, -15 compliance while active.
bannerbound.policy.agricultural_effort.d: Cultivated farmland yields double, but farmers stop tilling new ground.
bannerbound.policy.agricultural_effort.e: Farmland food x2; no new tilling.
bannerbound.policy.roads.name: Roads
bannerbound.policy.roads.description: Citizens prefer dirt paths and move faster on them. Requires the Paving science.
bannerbound.policy.roads.effect: +15% speed on dirt paths; pathing prefers them.
bannerbound.policy.rallying_speeches.des: Leaders keep the settlement unified through wartime speeches.
bannerbound.policy.rallying_speeches.eff: While at war: +10 compliance, -10 happiness. Exclusive with Glory Tales.
bannerbound.policy.glory_tales.name: Glory Tales
bannerbound.policy.glory_tales.descripti: New wars become stories of shared honor before fear sets in.
bannerbound.policy.glory_tales.effect: Once per enemy war: +10 happiness and +20 compliance for 1 day. Exclusive with Rallying Speeches.
bannerbound.outpost.established: Outpost established (%1$s/%2$s). Its banner is NOT protected — guard it.
bannerbound.outpost.lost: Your outpost at %1$s, %2$s has fallen — its banner was destroyed!
bannerbound.outpost.dismantled: Outpost dismantled — its working claim is released.
bannerbound.outpost.no_settlement: You must belong to a settlement to plant an outpost.
bannerbound.outpost.not_researched: Your settlement hasn't researched Outposts yet.
bannerbound.outpost.inside_territory: This is already your territory — outposts go beyond your borders.
bannerbound.outpost.chunk_taken: This chunk is already claimed or worked by a settlement.
bannerbound.outpost.in_city_state: This chunk belongs to a city-state. Plant your outpost outside its territory.
bannerbound.outpost.too_far: Too far from your territory (max %1$s chunks out).
bannerbound.outpost.limit: Your settlement can sustain at most %2$s outposts.
bannerbound.outpost.overworld_only: Outposts can only be planted in the overworld.
bannerbound.citizen.job.outpost_storage_: This worker's site is an outpost — the outpost decides the storage (a chest inside its chunk).
bannerbound.outpost.ui.title: Outpost
bannerbound.outpost.ui.storage_missing: Storage: no chest in this chunk — miners won't work!
bannerbound.outpost.ui.beds: Lodging: %s roofed bed(s) — workers sleep on site
bannerbound.outpost.ui.no_beds: Lodging: none — workers trek home nightly (add a roofed bed)
bannerbound.outpost.ui.assigned_none: No worker appointed — the post is idle.
bannerbound.outpost.ui.assigned_open: Open to all workers — appoint one below.
bannerbound.outpost.ui.vein_empty: Deposit worked out — it will refresh soon.
bannerbound.outpost.ui.no_candidates: None nearby — give a citizen the right job first (Miner for ore, Herder for livestock).
bannerbound.outpost.ui.establish_hint: This banner stands on workable ground beyond your border. Claim it as an outpost — the banner won't be protected, so guard the road to it.
bannerbound.outpost.no_pen: No pen marked in this chunk — fence a pen and mark it with the Foreman's Rod (Herder) first.
bannerbound.status.outpost_lost: Outpost lost at %s — its banner was destroyed.
bannerbound.outpost.no_deposit: This outpost has no workable deposit to mine.
bannerbound.outpost.candidate_gone: That worker is no longer available.
bannerbound.outpost.tool_too_soft: %s's pickaxe is too soft to chip this ore — give them a better one.
bannerbound.foremans_rod.mine_outpost_ma: Outposts manage their own deposit — right-click the Outpost Banner to appoint a miner.
bannerbound.policy.prospecting_quarry.de: Quarry crews watch the rubble for glints of ore as they dig. Slow, painstaking work — but no land is truly barren.
bannerbound.policy.prospecting_quarry.ef: Quarryworkers have a small chance to recover common raw ore from natural stone.
bannerbound.policy.night_watch.name: Night Watch
bannerbound.policy.night_watch.descripti: The watch stands through the night. Guards skip sleep and keep patrolling or manning their posts until dawn.
bannerbound.policy.night_watch.effect: Guards defend at night; guards: -12 happiness.
bannerbound.thought.nightshift_fatigue: Extended shifts are wearing me down.
bannerbound.thought.night_watch_weary: The night watch is wearing me thin.
bannerbound.chronicle.title: Chronicle
bannerbound.journal.title: Journal
bannerbound.force_max_age.set: Era cap set: no settlement may progress past the %s.
bannerbound.force_max_age.cleared: Era cap cleared — civilizations may advance freely.
bannerbound.force_max_age.current: Era cap: the %s. Research that would advance past it is blocked.
bannerbound.force_max_age.none: No era cap set — civilizations may advance freely.
bannerbound.research.future_unknown: Advance to a later era to reveal this research.
bannerbound.chunkclaim.error.not_in_sett: You don't belong to a settlement.
bannerbound.chunkclaim.error.already_you: This chunk is already part of your settlement.
bannerbound.chunkclaim.error.too_far: This chunk is too far from your settlement. Claims must be adjacent to existing ones.
